seoTitle: Mount Beauty vs Mount Best — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Beauty and Mount Best. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Beauty vs Mount Best: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Beauty and Mount Best.
heading: Mount Beauty vs Mount Best — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Beauty, Victoria and Mount Best, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Best has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Mount Beauty (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Beauty or Mount Best safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Beauty has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Mount Best scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Beauty scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Best scores 15/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Beauty or Mount Best?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Best has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
